title: Protest Death Toll Passes 200
detail: HRANA reports at least 214 protesters killed since demonstrations began on December 27. Security forces deploy armored vehicles in Tehran's Azadi Square. Reports emerge of mass arrests targeting university students and labor organizers. Internet speeds throttled to near-zero in Tehran, Isfahan, and Mashhad.

title: Protests Spread to All 31 Provinces
detail: For the first time, protest activity is documented in all 31 Iranian provinces, including traditionally loyalist rural areas. Factory workers in Khuzestan and oil sector employees in Bushehr join strikes. The breadth of the uprising surpasses the 2022 Mahsa Amini protests, which reached 29 provinces at peak.
